info.description: API for Managing Institutes and Schools.
info.title: School Management API

get.description: Returns all activity log entries for the authenticated user's institute.
Returns an admin's profile. School scope is derived from the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates one or more answers for the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more answers by UUID.

get.description: Returns all answers belonging to the given question.

post.description: Sends invitation emails to one or more recipients to join the caller's school. Requires authentication.

requestBody.description: List of recipients with email and role

post.description: Revokes the current session token.
Sends a one-time magic-link to the user's email for passwordless login.
Validates an invitation token, creates the user if needed, and returns a session token.
Validates the one-time magic-link token and returns a session token on success.
Assigns one or more faculty members to a cohort.

delete.description: Removes one or more faculty members from a cohort.

get.description: Returns all faculty members assigned to a cohort.

post.description: Assigns one or more students to a cohort.

delete.description: Removes one or more students from a cohort.

get.description: Returns all students assigned to a cohort.
Returns all cohorts belonging to the authenticated user's school.

post.description: Creates one or more cohorts under the caller's school.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more cohorts by UUID.

get.description: Returns a single cohort by UUID.
Returns all education systems available.

post.description: Creates one or more education systems.

requestBody.description: Array of education systems to create

delete.description: Deletes one or more education systems by UUID.

get.description: Returns an education system by its UUID.

post.description: Assigns one or more questions to an exam.

delete.description: Removes one or more questions from an exam.

get.description: Returns all questions assigned to an exam.

put.description: Updates an existing exam session's date/time details.

post.description: Creates one or more exam sessions. Date must be YYYY-MM-DD; start_time/end_time must be RFC3339.

requestBody.description: Array of exam sessions to create

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more exam sessions by UUID.

get.description: Returns all sessions belonging to the given exam.
Returns a single exam session by UUID.
Returns all exams belonging to the authenticated user's institute.

post.description: Creates one or more exams for the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more exams by UUID.

get.description: Returns a single exam by UUID.

post.description: Imports a list of faculty members, creating user accounts, school memberships, and optional cohort assignments in a single transaction. Rows missing both first_name and last_name are skipped.

get.description: Returns a faculty member's profile with their assigned cohorts. School scope is derived from the authenticated user.
Returns all grade ranges available.

post.description: Creates one or more grade ranges for the caller's institute.

requestBody.description: Array of grade ranges to create

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more grade ranges by UUID.

post.description: Links guardians to students within the caller's school.

delete.description: Removes the link between a guardian and a student.

get.description: Returns all guardian-student links for the given guardian UUID.

post.description: Imports a list of guardians, creating user accounts and school memberships in a single transaction. Rows missing both first_name and last_name are skipped.

get.description: Returns a guardian's profile with their linked students. School scope is derived from the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new institute.

get.description: Returns all pending and accepted invitations for the caller's school.
Returns the authenticated user's profile including institute and school context.

post.description: Creates one or more questions for the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more questions by UUID.

get.description: Returns all questions belonging to the given topic.
Returns a single question by UUID.
Returns school users for the caller's school. Supports filtering by search term and role, with pagination.

put.description: Updates role and registration number for a user in the caller's school.

post.description: Adds one or more users to the caller's school with a given role and registration number.
Creates one or more schools under the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a school by UUID path parameter.

get.description: Returns all schools belonging to the authenticated user's institute.
Returns a school record by UUID.

put.description: Updates a student's answer and marks for a question.

post.description: Records one or more question attempts for a student exam.

delete.description: Deletes all question attempts for a given student and exam session.

get.description: Returns all question attempts for a given student and exam session.

put.description: Updates evaluation details for a student exam.

post.description: Registers one or more students for an exam session.

delete.description: Removes one or more student exam registrations.

get.description: Returns all student exams for a given exam session.
get.summary: Get student exams by exam session

get.description: Returns all exams for a given student.

post.description: Imports a list of students, creating user accounts, school memberships, and optional cohort enrollments in a single transaction. Rows missing both first_name and last_name are skipped.

get.description: Returns a student's profile with their cohorts and linked guardians. School scope is derived from the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates one or more subjects for the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more subjects by UUID.

get.description: Returns all subjects belonging to the given year group.
Returns a single subject by UUID.

post.description: Creates one or more topics for the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more topics by UUID.

get.description: Returns all topics belonging to the given subject.
Returns a single topic by UUID.

put.description: Updates basic profile fields (first name, last name, phone) for a user.

get.description: Returns a user record for the given UUID.
Returns all year groups for a given education system UUID.
get.summary: Get year groups by education system

put.description: Updates a year group by UUID.

post.description: Creates one or more year groups under an education system.

requestBody.description: Array of year groups to create

delete.description: Deletes one or more year groups by UUID.

get.description: Returns a single year group by UUID.

somo-tracker-api_internal_common_apperro.description: Standard error envelope returned on failure.
